raw_text: udit kumar sahoo controls sub-system engineer at rolls-royce udit.kumar.sahoo0 gmail.com mob: +91-88670-38373 linkedin: http://in.linkedin.com/in/uditkumarsahoo summary: l am open to challenges in product development and systems engineering. i'm also incose certified associate systems engineering professional (asep). with an extensive skillset and leadership capabilities in systems engineering, explore and solve technical as well as non-technical hurdles to deliver cyber-physical solutions within the bounds of time, risk and investment. skills: systems engineering (mbse, doors), requirements management, traceability, configuration management, control systems, product development, software engineering, do-178b, arp4754, embedded systems, machine learning, avionics, c, c++, matlab, simulink, python, ada, vba, tcl, primavera foreign language proficiency: english full professional proficiency (toefl 109 (ibt) and ielts 8.0 (academic)) french beginners a1 (alliance francaise de bangalore in progress) employment history: controls sub-system engineer at rolls-royce may 2017 present (full-time) role - airframe engine integration engineer and control systems engineer e resolved control system requirement inconsistencies, requirement level/abstraction and traceability across multiple product systems and system/subsystem interfaces. on power generation under various solar panel configuration for srmsat bus. e feasibility study for incorporating argos 3 payload and upgrading the existing srmsat bus for deep space mission. e planning, scheduling and monitoring. design and testing of aerostatic bearing for satellite attitude control system testbed january 2014 to april 2014 the project was to develop satellite attitude control test system by designing and fabricating an aerostatic bearing which is essential to simulate reduced friction and micro gravity on ground. led a team of 3 and was also responsible for e bearing and carried out performance testing. e identified the causes for performance deviation from the numerical model education and professional development: srm university bachelor of technology
